name: Veggie Omelette
description: A fluffy omelette loaded with peppers, spinach and cheese.
steps: Whisk the eggs with a splash of milk and a pinch of salt.
Melt butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Saute the peppers and spinach until softened.
Pour in the eggs, top with cheddar, and fold when set.

name: Chicken Stir-Fry
description: Quick weeknight stir-fry with crisp vegetables.
steps: Slice the chicken and vegetables into bite-size pieces.
Sear the chicken until golden, then set aside.
Stir-fry garlic, onions, peppers, carrots and broccoli.
Return the chicken, toss with sauce, and serve hot.

name: Garden Salad
description: A crunchy fresh salad, ready in minutes.
steps: Wash and tear the lettuce into a bowl.
Chop the tomatoes, carrots and peppers.
Toss everything with your favourite dressing.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: Classic slow-simmered beef and tomato sauce.
steps: Brown the ground beef with onions and garlic.
Add chopped tomatoes and simmer for 30 minutes.
Season to taste and serve over pasta.

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
steps: Butter two slices of bread.
Layer cheddar between them.
Grill in a pan until golden on both sides.

name: Scrambled Eggs
steps: Whisk eggs with milk.
Cook gently in butter, stirring constantly.

name: Tomato Soup
steps: Saute onions and garlic in butter.
Add tomatoes and simmer.
Blend until smooth and season.

name: Carrot Ginger Soup
steps: Soften onions and garlic.
Add carrots and stock, simmer until tender.
Blend until velvety.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
description: Grilled chicken over crisp lettuce with cheese.
steps: Grill and slice the chicken.
Toss lettuce with dressing and cheese.
Top with the warm chicken.

name: Fruit & Yogurt Bowl
steps: Spoon yogurt into a bowl.
Top with sliced apples.

name: Stuffed Peppers
description: Bell peppers filled with savory beef.
steps: Brown beef with onions, garlic and chopped tomatoes.
Halve and core the peppers.
Fill and bake until tender.

name: Roasted Veggie Medley
steps: Chop all vegetables into chunks.
Toss with oil, garlic, salt and pepper.
Roast at 200C until caramelized.
